category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Step CI as an open-source API Quality Assurance framework.
source_facts.description says Step CI is API testing and monitoring made simple.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and docs use the Step CI name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to docs.stepci.com and documents CLI usage.
Official docs.stepci.com is the dedicated documentation domain.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository stepci/stepci is linked from the Step CI project and describes the API testing framework.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists REST, GraphQL, gRPC, tRPC, SOAP testing and CI/CD use.
source_facts.description identifies API testing and monitoring.
